/usr/bin/c++  -pthread -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/daq_capstone.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/daq_capstone.dir/src/App.cpp.o CMakeFiles/daq_capstone.dir/src/sensor/Sensor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/daq_capstone.dir/src/ui/MainFrame.cpp.o CMakeFiles/daq_capstone.dir/src/ui/ProjectPanel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/daq_capstone.dir/src/serial/SerialComm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/daq_capstone.dir/src/ui/HandshakeDialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/daq_capstone.dir/src/ui/LEDPanel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/daq_capstone.dir/src/ui/Sidebar.cpp.o -o daq_capstone  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libserialport.so -L/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu -pthread -lwx_gtk3u_core-3.2 -lwx_baseu-3.2 -lwx_gtk3u_aui-3.2
